after_code_change.description: Auto-fix ESLint issues after code changes
Run validation sequence (lint, typecheck, tests, MCP validation)

plan_mode_exit.description: Track plan execution metrics and provide feedback
Automated weekly learning review (runs every 10 plans)

runtimeNotes.node: Hooks run with tsx (TypeScript executor for Node.js)
runtimeNotes.recommendation: Use npx tsx for maximum compatibility. Install tsx: npm install -g tsx

triggerTypes.after_code_change: Fires after code modifications are made
triggerTypes.plan_mode_exit: Fires when exiting plan mode after execution
triggerTypes.stop: Fires on conversation stop (deprecated - use specific triggers)
